prompt: A precision instrument dial visualising an agent lifecycle as orbital data-states: BIRTH at top, OPERATION at centre, TERMINATION at bottom. Concentric engraved rings, a degree graticule 00/45/90/135/180/225/270/315, a dashed transition path, small checkpoint and termination marks. monochrome black ink line drawing on warm off-white paper #EDE9E5, a single brick-orange #E05A2B accent only, corner registration crosshairs, datum target triangles, dimension tolerances and an ISO-style title block; no colour anywhere except the one orange accent. 1960s Bell Labs technical manual crossed with a modern Anduril defense schematic — austere, clinical, exact.
